revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿五]][[zh:六月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿五]][[zh:六月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿五]][[zh:六月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿五]][[zh:六月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 25|qq=June 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}} ) – {{ill|Suwa Province|en|Suwa Province|qid=Q1192248|lt=Suwa Province|1=Suwa Province}} was separated from {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|qid=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}} . * {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|930|en|930|qid=Q23409|lt=930|1=930}} ) – The {{ill|Lightning strike at Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿落雷事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lightning strike at Seiryōden|1=Seiryōden lightning strike incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11561292}} occurred. Rumors spread attributing it to the vengeful spirit of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} . * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 26 (Julian calendar {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}} , {{ill|1419|en|1419|qid=Q6205|lt=1419|1=1419}} ) – The {{ill|Ōei Invasion|ja|Ōeiの外寇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Invasion|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} took place. Korea attacked {{ill|Tsushima Island|en|Tsushima Island|qid=Q52051|lt=Tsushima|1=Tsushima Island}} in response to continuous raids by {{ill|Wokou|en|Wokou|qid=Q697605|lt=Wokou|1=Wokou}} pirates. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – A submarine telegraph cable between Nagasaki and Shanghai opened, marking Japan's first international telegraph service.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 14 (Julian calendar {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}} , {{ill|1545|en|1545|qid=Q6531|lt=1545|1=1545}} ) – {{ill|Kamada Masachika|ja|鎌田政近|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamada Masachika|1=Q11651064|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11651064}} , Sengoku-era samurai and retainer of the {{ill|Shimazu clan|ja|Shimazu Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1605|en|1605|qid=Q6741|lt=1605|1=1605}} ) * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}} , {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} ) – {{ill|Kido Takayoshi|en|Kido Takayoshi|qid=Q696402|lt=Kido Takayoshi|1=Kido Takayoshi}} (Katsura Kogorō), one of the "Three Great Nobles of the Restoration" (d. {{ill|1877|en|1877|qid=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}} ) * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – {{ill|Kiyozawa Manshi|en|Kiyozawa Manshi|qid=Q6419167|lt=Kiyozawa Manshi|1=Kiyozawa Manshi}} , Buddhist priest and philosopher of the {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|qid=Q7108435|lt=Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}} sect (d. {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}} )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} 8 (Julian calendar July 24, {{ill|930|en|930|qid=Q23409|lt=930|1=930}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623386}} , Provisional Major Counselor and Minister of Popular Affairs, killed by lightning strike at Seiryōden (b. {{ill|867|en|867|qid=Q30347|lt=867|1=867}} ) * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 17 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1732|en|1732|qid=Q6966|lt=1732|1=1732}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Nobunori|ja|細川宣紀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Nobunori|1=Hosokawa Nobunori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605877}} , 4th lord of the {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|en|Kumamoto Domain|qid=Q1194248|lt=Kumamoto Domain|1=Kumamoto Domain}} (b. {{ill|1676|en|1676|qid=Q7628|lt=1676|1=1676}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|24|6|26|5|25|7|6|0625|qq=}}
